title: Technician Service Report
description: Create a technician/customer report from current session evidence.
starter_prompt: Create a technician service report from this AI session.

phases.prompt: Collect session transcript, commands, artifacts, citations, token/tool summary, and user goal.
Draft a technician-readable service report with issue, context, evidence, actions/tools used, verification, artifacts, cleanup status, residual risk, and follow-up.
Check for secrets, personal data, unsupported claims, missing evidence, and unclear next steps.
phases.completion: Report is safe to share or gaps are listed.

phases.prompt: Finalize report and add it to artifacts.
phases.completion: Report artifact exists and is referenced.

phases.prompt: Preserve final report and supporting evidence; remove only temporary draft scratch files created by this workflow.

acceptance_criteria: Secrets and unnecessary personal data are removed.
Verification and residual risk are included.
Generated report is saved as artifact.
